compiled_state.title: RED: test review_tier field acceptance in validate-review-output.sh schema
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement
Modify tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh to add tests:
- Findings JSON with review_tier field passes schema validation
- Findings JSON with review_tier=invalid_value fails validation (if schema enforces enum)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] New test cases FAIL (RED) against current validate-review-output.sh (schema rejects unknown fields)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — validate-review-output.sh uses Python inline validators; code-review-dispatch schema currently requires EXACTLY 3 keys (scores, findings, summary) and rejects extras. review_tier would currently be rejected. Tests will use _snapshot_fail + assert_pass_if_clean pattern for the RED test block, plus direct assert_eq/assert_ne for simpler cases.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — added two test cases after line 1051: (1) test_review_tier_valid_value_passes expects exit 0 for review_tier=standard (RED: current schema rejects unknown keys), (2) test_review_tier_invalid_value_fails expects exit non-zero for review_tier=ultra_deep (currently fails for wrong reason — unexpected key — should eventually fail due to enum validation)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — No implementation code needed (RED test task). Tests written to tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh. test_review_tier_valid_value_passes is RED (FAIL) as required. test_review_tier_invalid_value_fails is PASS (currently fails for wrong reason — unexpected key — will stay RED for enum check once schema accepts review_tier). Total: 65 passed, 1 failed.
comments.author: Main
